@graph.description: This dataset contains 100 files generated by Sequencing phase: Oxford Nanopore PromethION, Sequencing phase: Illumina iScan, Sequencing phase: Illumina NovaSeq6000 instruments. It also includes RO-Crate metadata file (ro-crate-metadata.json) that describes the context of data generation, such as the laboratory environment, the research institute, and the instruments used.
@graph.name: LAGE Experimental Raw Dataset for the Repository: orfeo

@graph.description: Script to generate RO-Crate descriptors for lab raw data folders
@graph.name: LAGE Folder Descriptor Generator

@graph.description: Quality control process for samples before sequencing, which may include NanoDrop uv absorbance measurements, report of technical observations and anomalies detected (both before and after sequencing), and other QC steps.
@graph.name: Sample Quality Control

@graph.description: Initial phase where the researcher or client provides the samples and Plate scheme description before sequencing.
@graph.name: Sample Acceptance Phase

@graph.description: JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) is a text-based data interchange format.
@graph.name: JSON

@graph.description: Comma-Separated Values text format.
@graph.name: CSV

@graph.description: Basic text file format containing unformatted text.
@graph.name: Plain Text

@graph.description: Lightweight markup language with plain-text-formatting syntax.
@graph.name: Markdown

@graph.description: Nanopore raw signal data format replacing fast5.
@graph.name: POD5

@graph.description: Text-based format for storing biological sequences and quality scores. They are generated during the post-sequencing basecalling step ost-run: data are demultiplexed and BCL files are converted into standard FASTQ file formats for downstream analysis.
@graph.name: FASTQ GZipped

@graph.description: Binary representation of the Sequence Alignment/Map (SAM) format.
@graph.name: BAM (Binary Alignment Map)

@graph.description: Index file for rapid access to BAM alignment files.
@graph.name: BAI (BAM Index)

@graph.description: Portable Document Format (PDF) is a file format used to present documents in a manner independent of application software, hardware, and operating systems.
@graph.name: PDF

@graph.description: Microsoft Excel Open XML Spreadsheet format.
@graph.name: Excel Spreadsheet (XLSX)

@graph.description: Joint Photographic Experts Group (JPEG) is a commonly used method of lossy compression for digital images.
@graph.name: JPEG Image

@graph.description: Portable Network Graphics (PNG) is a raster-graphics file-format that supports lossless data compression.
@graph.name: PNG Image

@graph.description: Main data directory containing outputs from Sequencing phase: Oxford Nanopore PromethION, Sequencing phase: Illumina iScan, Sequencing phase: Illumina NovaSeq6000 instrument(s).This dataset includes 2 .json files, 89 .csv files, 1 .md files, 1 .txt files, 2 .bam files, 2 .bam.bai files, 1 .pod5 files, 2 .fastq.gz files.
@graph.name: orfeo
